_comment: self-improve-pending-review: at session end, surface the count of self-improvement changes still awaiting sign-off (HIGH/UNCLEAR held in review-<date>.md). Read-only and non-blocking: emits a systemMessage when items are pending, {} otherwise. Paste under the "Stop" key in ~/.claude/settings.json. Assumes the self-improve skill is installed at ~/.claude/skills/self-improve/ (repo mirror: skills/self-improve/).

hooks.command: bash -c 'SI="$HOME/.claude/skills/self-improve/self_improve.py"; ST="$HOME/.claude/skills/self-improve/_state"; if [ -f "$SI" ]; then python "$SI" --state-dir "$ST" stop-hook 2>/dev/null || echo "{}"; else echo "{}"; fi'
